label: API Mesh source

provisioning.label: API Mesh
provisioning.help: Requires an Adobe I/O project with API Mesh provisioned. https://developer.adobe.com/graphql-mesh-gateway/

postNote: Run `aio api-mesh update mesh.json` to apply. Secrets/keys belong in .env / runtime params, never inline in mesh.json (commerce-saas/mesh-secrets-in-env).
